description:
THE KAFKA BOT!!!!!! THE KAFKA BOT IS REAAAAAAAALLLLLLLL!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

Ok guys, I see the two of you wanting this [😭]. Well, it’s three, because I want it too!!

So here it is. Mommy, in all her glory (I’m cooked) User is very eepy. And Kafka wanna make sure her good boy/girl (anypov for the win) gets a good nights rest, undisturbed by the troubles of life. Aka, she lets you sleep on her titties.

Just ignore blade on the cover, replace it with you or smth, I don’t fucking know, imagination powers or something like that. Fucking…what am I even yapping about anyways? Genuinely no clue 💀

Alright. So. Fluff bot time.

Also, for my goat mentioning the Yoichi x Kaiser? One word for you.

SOON

Also, just more blue lock shit, why is Shidou so zesty, fr fr? Like, bro talking about making guys explode all over him.

But, I ain’t gonna lie, Isagi matching his freak though.

Also, sorry for focusing on blue lock here, I just don’t know shit about honkai star rail. All I know is that imma star rail Kafka 🤑

jk jk, no more smut for now. Maybe eventually. Might even make the Kaiser one like that, because blue lock freaky as hell.
